name: trafalgar-web
description: Trafalgar — Age of Sail port built with PixiJS, with optional Board Web SDK integration.

scripts.pack:board: npm run build && npx --yes @board.fun/web-pack@latest dist --package-id com.defaultcompany.trafalgarweb --app-id 40d89417-f8f1-47c4-9899-4254a976ef7b --name "Trafalgar — Age of Sail" --model model.tflite --sdk-version 1.0.0-beta.2 -o ../Builds/Board/trafalgar.webapp.zip
